description.p: OpenMetaverseKit is a free Linux desktop application for generating locally hosted metaverse spaces with multiplayer rooms, Blender asset import, desktop social locomotion, avatar emotes, sit/stand interactions, and WebXR controller support.
This Flatpak build packages the Electron desktop shell from source and keeps the existing local Flatpak packaging isolated under packaging/flatpak/ for developer-side binary testing.

ul.li: Initial Linux desktop release with local metaverse generation and multiplayer rooms.
Added Blender asset import, emotes, social seating, and VR controller mappings.
Prepared an Electron BaseApp Flatpak path for Flathub-style source builds.
